_comment: Pack titles allow-listed for download by scripts/fetch-itch.mjs (PRD §IF4). Three buckets: PSX/retro (33 — every PSX-prefixed pack the user owns), horror (10 — the 10 horror-category packs the inventory surfaced), audio (15 — sampled horror/ambient/SFX/music for the AUDIO lane). Categories are inferred at runtime by scripts/fetch-itch.mjs; this file just enumerates titles. To enable an additional pack, find its title in docs/ITCH-INVENTORY.md and add it here. Total: 58 packs.
